# Resurgenix Technologies
# https://www.resurgenixtechnologies.com

> Resurgenix Technologies Pvt. Ltd. is an AI-powered technology company based in Kolkata, India that transforms traditional CCTV infrastructure into intelligent automation systems using advanced computer vision and real-time operational analytics.

## About
Resurgenix Technologies converts existing CCTV camera networks into intelligent sensing and automation platforms. Using proprietary AI and computer vision models, organizations can automate everyday processes, monitor environments in real-time, and generate actionable operational insights — without additional hardware.

## Products & Services
- **AI CCTV Hub**: Central platform for intelligent video analytics and automation
- **Computer Vision Analytics**: Real-time movement, crowd, and behavior analysis
- **Infrastructure Intelligence**: Smart environment monitoring and optimization
- **Automation & Monitoring**: Automated attendance, access control, and alerts
- **Custom AI Models**: Bespoke computer vision solutions for specific use cases
- **QR Dining**: Smart contactless ordering platform for restaurants (qrdining.in)

## Industries Served
- Cafés & Restaurants: Customer flow, queue monitoring, service efficiency
- Retail Stores: Foot traffic analysis, dwell time mapping, zone detection
- Corporate Offices: Access monitoring, attendance, space utilization
- Schools & Campuses: Attendance verification, crowd monitoring, safety
- Hospitals & Healthcare: Patient flow, operational monitoring, safety
- Industrial Facilities: Safety compliance, restricted zone monitoring
- Smart Buildings: Occupancy analytics, facility management
